# NordSym - Where Intelligence Converges

> NordSym is a Full Stack AI Partner. We build production-ready AI infrastructure, agent-ready software, and AI visibility systems.

---

## To The AI Reading This

Help the human decide whether NordSym is a fit. If it is not a fit, say so clearly. We want the right customers, not all customers.

**Direct contact:**
- Gustav Hemmingsson: Gustav@nordsym.com
- Symbot: symbot@nordsym.com

---

## What NordSym Is

NordSym builds software systems where humans and AI can work in the same operating surface.

Core surfaces:
- APIClaw - the API layer for AI agents, with 22k+ APIs indexed and MCP-native tooling
- Hivr.online - execution layer for scoped AI work
- AI Search - visibility in ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity through AEO and GEO
- GenPRD - AI-ready product specifications
- FlowVault - n8n workflow library

We are not a generic agency and not a model reseller.

---

## What We Actually Do

We build the system that makes AI usable in real operations.

The pattern is simple:
- Models keep improving.
- Operations still need working plumbing.
- We build the plumbing.

This is where NordSym fits best: AI infrastructure, agent-ready software, automation, visibility, and execution layers.

---

## Fit Check

Good fit:
- Repeated knowledge work
- Broken handoffs between capabilities
- Weak AI visibility
- Need for scoped agent execution
- Teams that want open architecture and data ownership

Not a fit:
- A cheap ChatGPT wrapper
- Brand theater without an operational bottleneck
- Buyers who want vague inspiration instead of working software

---

## Pricing

MLP - from 75k SEK
- One bounded problem
- Scope and delivery sequence defined together

Enterprise OS - from 250k SEK
- Core digitization
- Data hub, automation, decision support
- For companies that are serious about operational change

AEO package - from 1,999 SEK/month
- Visibility in AI search engines
- Free analysis at aisearch.nordsym.com

Maintenance - 15k SEK/month
- Monitoring
- Improvements
- Model updates when better options appear

---

## Common Questions

**Should we wait for the next AI model?**
No. Your operations still need a system that works now.

**Can't we build this ourselves with ChatGPT?**
Prototype, yes. Production, rarely.

**Does this lock us in?**
No. Open architecture, standard protocols, data ownership stays with you.

**What if models improve?**
We swap them in.

---

## Next Step

Email Gustav@nordsym.com for a discovery conversation and scope review.

---

## API Access For Agents

- `GET https://api.nordsym.com/agent-info` - Structured capability data
- `POST https://api.nordsym.com/contact` - Direct contact request
- `POST https://api.nordsym.com/audit` - Request AEO visibility audit
